title: fedora31 / podman containers pulls in selinux-policy and selinux-policy-targeted
body:
<!--
---------------------------------------------------
BUG REPORT INFORMATION
---------------------------------------------------
Use the commands below to provide key information from your environment:
You do NOT have to include this information if this is a FEATURE REQUEST

**NOTE** A large number of issues reported against Podman are often found to already be fixed
in more current versions of the project.  Before reporting an issue, please verify the
version you are running with `podman version` and compare it to the latest release
documented on the top of Podman's [README.md](../README.md).  If they differ, please
update your version of Podman to the latest possible and retry your command before creating
an issue.

If you are filing a bug against `podman build`, please instead file a bug
against Buildah (https://github.com/containers/buildah/issues). Podman build
executes Buildah to perform container builds, and as such the Buildah
maintainers are best equipped to handle these bugs.
-->

/kind bug


**Description**

Since January 2020 podman on Fedora 31 has a what seems to be a hard dependency on  container-selinux, selinux-policy and selinux-policy-targeted

This causes our rather small container build images to expand with the entirety of an selinux-policy, which isn't really useful inside a container.

``` 
[root@3b851abf3cec /]# dnf install podman  --setopt install_weak_deps=false
Last metadata expiration check: 0:02:22 ago on Mon Feb 10 17:53:54 2020.
Dependencies resolved.
===============================================================================================
 Package                            Architecture  Version                 Repository      Size
===============================================================================================
Installing:
 podman                             x86_64        2:1.8.0-2.fc31          updates         13 M
Installing dependencies:
 conmon                             x86_64        2:2.0.10-2.fc31         updates         38 k
 container-selinux                  noarch        2:2.124.0-3.fc31        updates         48 k
 containernetworking-plugins        x86_64        0.8.5-1.fc31            updates         11 M
 containers-common                  x86_64        1:0.1.40-4.fc31         updates         49 k
 crun                               x86_64        0.12.1-1.fc31           updates        162 k
 podman-plugins                     x86_64        2:1.8.0-2.fc31          updates        1.4 M
 selinux-policy                     noarch        3.14.4-47.fc31          updates        119 k
 selinux-policy-targeted            noarch        3.14.4-47.fc31          updates         13 M
 diffutils                          x86_64        3.7-3.fc31              fedora         401 k
 iptables                           x86_64        1.8.3-5.fc31            fedora         468 k
 jansson                            x86_64        2.12-4.fc31             fedora          43 k
 libmnl                             x86_64        1.0.4-10.fc31           fedora          28 k
 libnetfilter_conntrack             x86_64        1.0.7-3.fc31            fedora          63 k
 libnfnetlink                       x86_64        1.0.1-16.fc31           fedora          30 k
 libnftnl                           x86_64        1.1.3-2.fc31            fedora          81 k
 libselinux-utils                   x86_64        2.9-5.fc31              fedora         160 k
 nftables                           x86_64        1:0.9.1-3.fc31          fedora         315 k
 policycoreutils                    x86_64        2.9-5.fc31              fedora         212 k
 rpm-plugin-selinux                 x86_64        4.15.0-6.fc31           fedora          21 k
 yajl                               x86_64        2.1.0-13.fc31           fedora          39 k

Transaction Summary
===============================================================================================
Install  21 Packages

Total download size: 41 M
Installed size: 191 M
```



<!--
Briefly describe the problem you are having in a few paragraphs.
-->

**Steps to reproduce the issue:**

1.` podman run -ti --rm=true fedora:31 dnf install podman --setopt install_weak_deps=false`

2.  Check output of dependency grap

3. attempt to remove `selinux-policy and selinux-policy-targeted` and it will remove podman as well.

**Describe the results you received:**
Larger container image than before

**Describe the results you expected:**
a rathe light-weight build image for containers

**Additional information you deem important (e.g. issue happens only occasionally):**
This seems to have happened in an attempt to make the container-selinux dependency optional in Fedora? 

https://src.fedoraproject.org/rpms/podman/c/9eb76ba048e78849236f8db879c25cb54330da66


**Package info (e.g. output of `rpm -q podman` or `apt list podman`):**

```
podman-1.8.0-2.fc31.x86_64```

comments.body: It should be a "Recommends" rather then a "Requires"
This is not an upstream issue, it should be a bugzilla in Redhat and fedora.
